name: Sweet and Sour Vegetables Ff (Rbfv65a)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain water chestnuts and bamboo shoots, rinse well, and set aside with fresh water.
2. Prepare all ingredients and sauce ahead of time.
3. Pour about 1 oz of white wine into a deep cooking pot lined with parchment paper or foil.
4. Turn heat to high and let the wine come to a boil.
5. When the wine is hot, add lecithin if using and stir vigorously.
6. Saute carrots for about five minutes before adding other vegetables.
7. Add pepper, cauliflower, onions, green onions, garlic, and ginger. Stir immediately and vigorously.
8. Continue sauteing with small amounts of wine as it evaporates, keeping the bottom of the pot somewhat dry.
9. When vegetables are softened, add broccoli and pea pods. Stir well and cover.
10. If needed, add a small amount of wine to prevent sticking; cook for about three minutes.
11. Add tofu (if using), pineapple, water chestnuts, and bamboo shoots. Stir thoroughly and cover.
12. Cook for an additional two or three minutes.
13. Measure sauce ingredients into a separate bowl, stir well, and pour over the vegetables.
14. Turn heat to medium and stir constantly until the sauce just begins to bubble and thickens.
15. Serve with basmati rice, quinoa, or your preferred grain.
